top_signals.title: Oil Edges Higher as Traders Weigh the Outlook for US-Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil edged higher after falling almost 3% in the previous session following early progress in peace talks over the Iran war, which included a US waiver allowing some sales from the Islamic Republic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Race to Revive Venezuela’s Vast Oil Wealth Is Underway
top_signals.summary: After Washington snatched Venezuela’s authoritarian president, Nicolas Maduro, in a daring January 2026 night raid, the country’s long road to recovery began. Under the leadership of Maduro’s former vice-president, Delcy Rodriguez, economically crucial oil production and exports are rising. President Trump is pressing Caracas to raise output, all while the U.S. president urges big oil to invest in the near-failed state. While doubts linger over whether production can return to historic highs, Venezuela recently recorded its highest…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. Senate passes housing bill that carries four-year ban on a Fed CBDC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
top_signals.summary: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.
